title: Qadesh #6946
definition:
Kadesh = "holy"

 1) a city in the extreme south of Judah
    1a) same as 'Kedesh' and 'Kadesh-barnea'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kadesh = "holy"

 1) a city in the extreme south of Judah
    1a) same as 'Kedesh' and 'Kadesh-barnea'

    NASB:  sacred, a place in the desert
